messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a robust PowerPoint presentation for project stakeholders in the Construction industry updating them on our infrastructure development timeline, containing exactly 18 slides with an industrial theme using orange, dark gray, and concrete beige colors. The output filename must be "Infrastructure_Development.pptx". Write all presentation content in English and use 16:9 Widescreen orientation. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping; generate all data locally based on standard construction project milestones. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.DOUGHNUT`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt, Emu
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# Slide dimensions (16:9 widescreen)
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

# Color palette
ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x6B, 0x35)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x2D, 0x2D)
CONCRETE_BEIGE = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xE0, 0xD4)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
LIGHT_ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xF3, 0xED)
OFF_WHITE = RGBColor(0xFA, 0xF9, 0xF7)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6B, 0x6B, 0x6B)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xD4, 0xD4, 0xD4)

# Typography constants
TITLE_FONT_SIZE = Pt(32)
SUBTITLE_FONT_SIZE = Pt(18)
BODY_FONT_SIZE = Pt(14)
CARD_TITLE_FONT_SIZE = Pt(16)
SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE = Pt(12)
SECTION_LABEL_FONT_SIZE = Pt(10)

# Layout constants
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.8)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.8)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT
CARD_WIDTH = Inches(3.5)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(2.0)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.15)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    """Convert hex color string to RGBColor."""
    hex_color = hex_color.lstrip('#')
    return RGBColor(int(hex_color[0:2], 16), int(hex_color[2:4], 16), int(hex_color[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    """Set the background fill of a slide."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=BODY_FONT_SIZE,
                 font_color=DARK_GRAY, bold=False, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT,
                 font_name='Calibri', line_spacing=None):
    """Add a formatted text box to the slide."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = font_size
    p.font.color.rgb = font_color
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.alignment = alignment
    if line_spacing:
        p.line_spacing = line_spacing
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title=None, body_text=None,
             accent_color=ORANGE):
    """Add a styled card with optional title and body text."""
    # Card background
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    shape.line.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    # Accent bar on the left edge
    accent_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top + Inches(0.2),
                                        Inches(0.08), height - Inches(0.4))
    accent_bar.fill.solid()
    accent_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = accent_color

    # Title
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.35), top + Inches(0.25), width - Inches(0.6),
                     Inches(0.4), title, CARD_TITLE_FONT_SIZE, DARK_GRAY, True)

    # Body text
    if body_text:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.35), top + Inches(0.75), width - Inches(0.6),
                     height - Inches(1.0), body_text, BODY_FONT_SIZE, MEDIUM_GRAY)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    """Add a section label at the top of a content slide."""
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.35), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.4),
                 text, SECTION_LABEL_FONT_SIZE, ORANGE, True)


def add_footer(slide, page_num):
    """Add footer with company name and page number."""
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.3),
                 'Apex Infrastructure Group', SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(2), Inches(7.1), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3),
                 f'Page {page_num}', SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY, False, PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, alt_text='Image'):
    """Add an image if path exists, otherwise a styled placeholder."""
    img_path = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), 'assets', alt_text.lower().replace(' ', '_') + '.png')
    if os.path.exists(img_path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(img_path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_ORANGE
        shape.line.color.rgb = ORANGE
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height / 2 - Inches(0.15)),
                     width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), alt_text, SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE,
                     ORANGE, False, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def create_doughnut_chart(slide, left, top, width, height, title, categories, values):
    """Create a doughnut chart showing project metrics."""
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories
    chart_data.add_series('Progress', values)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.DOUGHNUT, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(12)
    data_labels.font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
    data_labels.number_format = '0%'

    # Style the first slice (orange) and rest (light gray)
    series = plot.series[0]
    for i, point in enumerate(series.points):
        if i == 0:
            point.format.fill.solid()
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
        else:
            point.format.fill.solid()
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    # Chart title
    chart.has_title = True
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = title
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(14)
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    return chart_frame


def create_bar_chart(slide, left, top, width, height, title, categories, values):
    """Create a clustered column bar chart for budget data."""
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories
    chart_data.add_series('Budget Allocation ($M)', values)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    for point in series.points:
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE

    chart.has_legend = False
    chart.has_title = True
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = title
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(14)
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    return chart_frame


# ==================== SLIDE BUILDERS ====================

def build_slide_1_title(prs):
    """Slide 1: Title Slide"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    # Orange accent bar at top
    top_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.15))
    top_bar.fill.solid()
    top_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE

    # Title text
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(2.0), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(1.2),
                 'Infrastructure Development Update', TITLE_FONT_SIZE + Pt(8), DARK_GRAY, True)

    # Subtitle
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(3.4), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6),
                 'Q4 2025 Progress Report & Strategic Outlook', SUBTITLE_FONT_SIZE, ORANGE, False)

    # Divider line
    divider = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(4.3),
                                     Inches(1.5), Inches(0.06))
    divider.fill.solid()
    divider.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE

    # Date and company info
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(4.7), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.3),
                 'October 2025', BODY_FONT_SIZE, MEDIUM_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.1), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.3),
                 'Apex Infrastructure Group | Prepared for Stakeholders', SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY)

    # Bottom accent bar
    bottom_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.35), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.15))
    bottom_bar.fill.solid()
    bottom_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE


def build_slide_2_agenda(prs):
    """Slide 2: Agenda"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    # Title
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'Agenda'
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = TITLE_FONT_SIZE + Pt(4)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_section_label(slide, 'Presentation Overview')

    agenda_items = [
        ('1', 'Executive Summary'),
        ('2', 'Project Phases & Timeline'),
        ('3', 'Quality Assurance & Safety'),
        ('4', 'Budget & Financial Overview'),
        ('5', 'Risk Management Framework'),
        ('6', 'Team & Stakeholder Engagement'),
    ]

    y_start = Inches(1.2)
    for num, item in agenda_items:
        # Number circle
        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), y_start,
                                        Inches(0.5), Inches(0.5))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.42), y_start + Inches(0.08),
                     Inches(0.3), Inches(0.35), num, Pt(16), WHITE, True, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        # Item text
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(1.0), y_start + Inches(0.07),
                     CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(1.2), Inches(0.45), item[1], BODY_FONT_SIZE + Pt(2), DARK_GRAY)

        # Separator line (except last)
        if num != '6':
            sep = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(1.0), y_start + Inches(0.55),
                                         CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(1.2), Inches(0.01))
            sep.fill.solid()
            sep.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

        y_start += Inches(0.7)


def build_slide_3_executive_summary(prs):
    """Slide 3: Executive Summary"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'Executive Summary'
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = TITLE_FONT_SIZE + Pt(4)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_section_label(slide, 'Key Highlights')

    summary_data = [
        ('Project Value', '$2.8B', 'Total investment across all phases'),
        ('Timeline', '36 Months', 'Jan 2024 – Dec 2026'),
        ('Milestones', '7 of 12', '58% completion rate achieved'),
        ('Safety Record', '99.2%', 'Days without lost-time incident'),
    ]

    x_start = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3)
    for i, (label, value, desc) in enumerate(summary_data):
        card_left = x_start + i * (CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, card_left, Inches(1.2), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(2.5), label, None, ORANGE)

        # Value text inside card
        add_text_box(slide, card_left + Inches(0.35), Inches(1.7), CARD_WIDTH - Inches(0.6),
                     Inches(0.8), value, Pt(36), DARK_GRAY, True, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        # Description
        add_text_box(slide, card_left + Inches(0.35), Inches(2.5), CARD_WIDTH - Inches(0.6),
                     Inches(1.0), desc, SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, MEDIUM_GRAY, False, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def build_slide_4_project_overview(prs):
    """Slide 4: Project Overview"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'Project Overview'
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = TITLE_FONT_SIZE + Pt(4)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_section_label(slide, 'Metro Corridor Expansion Initiative')

    # Left column: description
    desc_text = ('The Metro Corridor Expansion is a comprehensive infrastructure development project spanning 45 miles across three metropolitan regions. This initiative includes highway upgrades, rail integration, bridge reconstruction, and smart traffic management systems designed to serve over 2 million daily commuters.')
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), CONTENT_WIDTH / 2 - Inches(0.3), Inches(4.5),
                 desc_text, BODY_FONT_SIZE + Pt(1), DARK_GRAY)

    # Right column: key facts cards
    facts = [
        ('Location', 'Tri-State Metropolitan Area'),
        ('Contractor', 'Apex Infrastructure Group'),
        ('Start Date', 'January 2024'),
        ('Target Completion', 'December 2026'),
        ('Workforce', '12,500+ Active Workers'),
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(1.0)
    for label, value in facts:
        add_card(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH, y_pos, CARD_WIDTH, Inches(0.7), None, None, ORANGE)
        add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH + Inches(0.35), y_pos + Inches(0.12),
                     Inches(2.5), Inches(0.45), label, SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, ORANGE, True)
        add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH + Inches(0.35), y_pos + Inches(0.38),
                     Inches(2.5), Inches(0.3), value, BODY_FONT_SIZE, DARK_GRAY)
        y_pos += Inches(0.75)


def build_slide_5_phase1(prs):
    """Slide 5: Phase 1 - Site Preparation & Surveying"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'Phase 1: Site Preparation'
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = TITLE_FONT_SIZE + Pt(4)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_section_label(slide, 'Completed — January to March 2024')

    # Status badge
    badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - Inches(3),
                                   Inches(1.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.5))
    badge.fill.solid()
    badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - Inches(2.8), Inches(1.07),
                 Inches(2.0), Inches(0.4), 'COMPLETED', Pt(14), WHITE, True, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Phase details cards
    phase_items = [
        ('Geotechnical Survey', 'Completed soil analysis across 45-mile corridor with 320 borehole samples'),
        ('Environmental Assessment', 'EIA approved by state environmental board; no critical impacts identified'),
        ('Land Acquisition', '98% of required parcels acquired; eminent domain proceedings for remaining 2%'),
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(1.7)
    for title, body in phase_items:
        add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), y_pos, CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5),
                 title, body, ORANGE)
        y_pos += Inches(1.7)


def build_slide_6_phase2(prs):
    """Slide 6: Phase 2 - Foundation Work"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'Phase 2: Foundation Work'
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = TITLE_FONT_SIZE + Pt(4)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_section_label(slide, 'Completed — April to September 2024')

    badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - Inches(3),
                                   Inches(1.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.5))
    badge.fill.solid()
    badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - Inches(2.8), Inches(1.07),
                 Inches(2.0), Inches(0.4), 'COMPLETED', Pt(14), WHITE, True, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    phase_items = [
        ('Pile Foundation Installation', '3,200 driven piles installed across 18 bridge sites and major structures'),
        ('Excavation & Grading', '2.5 million cubic yards of earthwork completed; subgrade compaction verified'),
        ('Drainage Systems', 'Primary drainage network installed including 45 miles of culvert systems'),
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(1.7)
    for title, body in phase_items:
        add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), y_pos, CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5),
                 title, body, ORANGE)
        y_pos += Inches(1.7)


def build_slide_7_phase3(prs):
    """Slide 7: Phase 3 - Structural Construction"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'Phase 3: Structural Construction'
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = TITLE_FONT_SIZE + Pt(4)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_section_label(slide, 'In Progress — October 2024 to June 2025')

    badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - Inches(3),
                                   Inches(1.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.5))
    badge.fill.solid()
    badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - Inches(2.8), Inches(1.07),
                 Inches(2.0), Inches(0.4), 'IN PROGRESS', Pt(13), WHITE, True, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Progress bar visual
    progress_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.5),
                                          Inches(1.2), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(1.0), Inches(0.4))
    progress_bar.fill.solid()
    progress_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    progress_fill = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.5),
                                           Inches(1.2), Inches((CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(1.0)) * 0.65), Inches(0.4))
    progress_fill.fill.solid()
    progress_fill.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.7), Inches(1.23), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.35),
                 '65% Complete', Pt(14), WHITE, True)

    # Milestone cards below progress bar
    milestones = [
        ('Bridge Piers', '8 of 12 major piers erected'),
        ('Tunnel Boring', 'TBM-01 advanced 3.2 km of 5 km tunnel'),
        ('Deck Construction', '40% of highway deck segments placed'),
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(1.9)
    for title, body in milestones:
        add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), y_pos, CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5),
                 title, body, ORANGE)
        y_pos += Inches(1.7)


def build_slide_8_phase4(prs):
    """Slide 8: Phase 4 - MEP Systems"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'Phase 4: MEP Systems'
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = TITLE_FONT_SIZE + Pt(4)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_section_label(slide, 'Scheduled — July to December 2025')

    badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - Inches(3),
                                   Inches(1.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.5))
    badge.fill.solid()
    badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - Inches(2.8), Inches(1.07),
                 Inches(2.0), Inches(0.4), 'UPCOMING', Pt(14), DARK_GRAY, True, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    phase_items = [
        ('Mechanical Systems', 'HVAC installation for 6 major stations and control centers'),
        ('Electrical Infrastructure', 'High-voltage distribution network and backup power systems'),
        ('Plumbing & Fire Protection', 'Water mains, fire suppression, and stormwater management systems'),
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(1.7)
    for title, body in phase_items:
        add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), y_pos, CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5),
                 title, body, ORANGE)
        y_pos += Inches(1.7)


def build_slide_9_phase5(prs):
    """Slide 9: Phase 5 - Exterior Finishing"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'Phase 5: Exterior & Landscaping'
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = TITLE_FONT_SIZE + Pt(4)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_section_label(slide, 'Scheduled — January to June 2026')

    badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - Inches(3),
                                   Inches(1.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.5))
    badge.fill.solid()
    badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - Inches(2.8), Inches(1.07),
                 Inches(2.0), Inches(0.4), 'UPCOMING', Pt(14), DARK_GRAY, True, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    phase_items = [

def build_slide_12_safety(prs):
    """Slide 12: Safety Performance Metrics"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:

        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_section_label(slide, 'Zero Harm Initiative')

    # Doughnut chart for safety metrics
    create_doughnut_chart(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), Inches(1.2), Inches(4.5), Inches(4.0),
                          'Safety Record', ['Accident-Free Days', 'Incidents'], [0.992, 0.008])

    # Safety stats cards on the right
    safety_stats = [
        ('Days Without LTI', '1,247'),
        ('TRIR Rate', '0.32 (Industry avg: 1.5)'),
        ('Safety Training Hours', '48,000+ this quarter'),
        ('Near-Miss Reports', '94% resolved within 48 hours'),
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(1.2)
    for label, value in safety_stats:
        add_card(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH, y_pos, CARD_WIDTH, Inches(1.3), None, None, ORANGE)
        add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH + Inches(0.35), y_pos + Inches(0.12),
                     CARD_WIDTH - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), label, SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, ORANGE, True)
        add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - CARD_WIDTH + Inches(0.35), y_pos + Inches(0.55),
                     CARD_WIDTH - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), value, Pt(18), DARK_GRAY, True)
        y_pos += Inches(1.4)

def build_slide_15_team(prs):
    """Slide 15: Project Team"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'Project Leadership'
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = TITLE_FONT_SIZE + Pt(4)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_section_label(slide, 'Key Stakeholders & Management Team')

    team_members = [
        ('Sarah Chen', 'Project Director', '25+ years in infrastructure'),
        ('Marcus Rivera', 'Chief Engineer', 'Structural engineering lead'),
        ('Dr. James Okafor', 'Safety Officer', 'OSHA certified specialist'),
        ('Priya Sharma', 'Finance Manager', 'Budget and procurement oversight'),
    ]

    x_start = MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3)
    for i, (name, role, bio) in enumerate(team_members):
        card_left = x_start + i * (CARD_WIDTH + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, card_left, Inches(1.2), CARD_WIDTH, Inches(2.5), None, None, ORANGE)

        # Placeholder for photo
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, card_left + Inches(0.8),
                                             Inches(1.4), Inches(1.8), Inches(1.8))
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_ORANGE
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = ORANGE
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)

        add_text_box(slide, card_left + Inches(0.35), Inches(3.4), CARD_WIDTH - Inches(0.6),
                     Inches(0.4), name, Pt(18), DARK_GRAY, True, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, card_left + Inches(0.35), Inches(3.9), CARD_WIDTH - Inches(0.6),
                     Inches(0.3), role, SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, ORANGE, False, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, card_left + Inches(0.35), Inches(4.3), CARD_WIDTH - Inches(0.6),
                     Inches(1.2), bio, SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, MEDIUM_GRAY, False, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

def build_slide_18_next_steps(prs):
    """Slide 18: Next Steps & Contact"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    # Orange accent bar at top
    top_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.15))
    top_bar.fill.solid()
    top_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = 'Next Steps & Contact'
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = TITLE_FONT_SIZE + Pt(4)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    add_section_label(slide, 'Looking Ahead')

    # Next steps cards
    next_steps = [
        ('Immediate Actions', 'Complete Phase 3 structural work by June 2025; begin MEP procurement'),
        ('Q1 2026 Milestone', 'Bridge deck completion and tunnel breakthrough celebration'),
        ('Stakeholder Meeting', 'Next quarterly review scheduled for January 15, 2026'),
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(1.2)
    for title, body in next_steps:
        add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), y_pos, CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5),
                 title, body, ORANGE)
        y_pos += Inches(1.7)

    # Contact information card at bottom
    contact_card = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3),
                                          Inches(5.8), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2))
    contact_card.fill.solid()
    contact_card.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_ORANGE
    contact_card.line.color.rgb = ORANGE
    contact_card.line.width = Pt(2)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.6), Inches(5.9), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(1.2),
                 Inches(0.3), 'Contact Information', SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, ORANGE, True)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.6), Inches(6.2), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(1.2),
                 Inches(0.7), 'Project Office: projects@apexinfra.com | Phone: (555) 892-4100\nWebsite: www.apexinfrastructure.com',
                 SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, DARK_GRAY)

    # Bottom accent bar
    bottom_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.35), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.15))
    bottom_bar.fill.solid()
    bottom_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE


def main():
    """Main function to create the infrastructure development presentation."""
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    # Build all 18 slides
    build_slide_1_title(prs)
    build_slide_2_agenda(prs)
    build_slide_3_executive_summary(prs)
    build_slide_4_project_overview(prs)
    build_slide_5_phase1(prs)
    build_slide_6_phase2(prs)
    build_slide_7_phase3(prs)
    build_slide_8_phase4(prs)
    build_slide_9_phase5(prs)
    build_slide_10_phase6(prs)
    build_slide_11_quality(prs)
    build_slide_12_safety(prs)
    build_slide_13_budget(prs)
    build_slide_14_risk(prs)
    build_slide_15_team(prs)
    build_slide_16_sustainability(prs)
    build_slide_17_community(prs)
    build_slide_18_next_steps(prs)

    # Save the presentation
    prs.save('Infrastructure_Development.pptx')


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
